claim_text: The number of students ages 3–21 served under IDEA increased from 6.4 million (2012–13) to 7.5 million (2022–23).
evidence_snippets: The number of students ages 3–21 served under IDEA ... increased from 6.4 million in school year 2012–13 to 7.5 million in school year 2022–23.

claim_text: In 2023–24, approximately 7.9 million children with disabilities ages 3 through 21 received IDEA Part B services.
evidence_snippets: In the 2023-2024 school year (SY), approximately 7.9 million children with disabilities ages 3 through 21 received special education and related services under Part B of the IDEA.
